_patch_meta.description: Differential correction patch — applies if PATCH-20260331-VCB006-VERSECONTEXT-V1 has already been applied to the database. Restores H7451A (raʿ — bad: harmful, mti_id=235) group 235-001 which was incorrectly dissolved in V1. Operations: 1 INSERT into verse_context_group; 5 UPDATEs to verse_context rows (changing from set-aside to classified under group 235-001). No other terms are affected. Claude Code must: (1) execute the group INSERT first; (2) capture last_insert_rowid() as the integer id for group 235-001; (3) use that integer id in all 5 verse_context UPDATEs. The group_code '235-001' in the UPDATE operations is a human-readable reference only — the actual group_id field must be populated with the captured integer.

record.context_description: Bad news and evil report as occasion of inner fear, grief or sadness
record.notes: Restored by differential patch PATCH-20260401-VCB006-VERSECONTEXT-DIFF-V1: group was incorrectly dissolved in V1 due to duplicate group code in observations file

operations.description: INSERT group 235-001 for H7451A: Bad news and evil report as occasion of inner fear, grief or sadness
operations.claude_code_instruction: After INSERT, capture last_insert_rowid() as integer_id_235_001. Use this integer in DIFF-OP-002 through DIFF-OP-006.

set.notes: Restored by DIFF-V1: incorrectly set aside in V1 — Neh 2:2 sadness of the heart is explicitly inner-being relevant

_application_sequence: Step 1: Execute DIFF-OP-001 — INSERT verse_context_group for 235-001
Step 2: Capture last_insert_rowid() → store as integer_id_235_001
Step 3: Execute DIFF-OP-002: UPDATE verse_context WHERE verse_record_id=155993 AND mti_term_id=235 — set group_id=integer_id_235_001, is_relevant=1, is_anchor=1, is_related=0
Step 4: Execute DIFF-OP-003: UPDATE verse_context WHERE verse_record_id=155992 AND mti_term_id=235 — set group_id=integer_id_235_001, is_relevant=1, is_anchor=0, is_related=1
Step 5: Execute DIFF-OP-004: UPDATE verse_context WHERE verse_record_id=155978 AND mti_term_id=235 — set group_id=integer_id_235_001, is_relevant=1, is_anchor=0, is_related=1
Step 6: Execute DIFF-OP-005: UPDATE verse_context WHERE verse_record_id=155964 AND mti_term_id=235 — set group_id=integer_id_235_001, is_relevant=1, is_anchor=0, is_related=1
Step 7: Execute DIFF-OP-006: UPDATE verse_context WHERE verse_record_id=12362 AND mti_term_id=235 — set group_id=integer_id_235_001, is_relevant=1, is_anchor=0, is_related=1
Step 8: Validate — query verse_context WHERE mti_term_id=235: confirm 19 rows is_relevant=1, 45 rows is_relevant=0, group 235-001 has 1 anchor and 4 related

verify_before_applying: Confirm PATCH-20260331-VCB006-VERSECONTEXT-V1 has been applied (verse_context rows exist for mti_term_id=235)
Confirm group_code '235-001' does NOT yet exist in verse_context_group for mti_term_id=235
Confirm verse_context rows for vid=155993,155992,155978,155964,12362 with mti_term_id=235 exist and have is_relevant=0
